title: Observability
text: Observability The observability feature in Uniface offers insights into your application's internal state by analyzing telemetry data. It enables you to monitor performance, troubleshoot issues, and optimize your application for reliability and scalability. Observability in Uniface is based on the OpenTelemetry (OTel) standard, ensuring compatibility with popular tools such as Jaeger, Tempo, Loki, and ELK. This feature enables the collection of observability data without requiring changes to existing Uniface applications. To begin generating telemetry, activate the required configuration settings. Supported Telemetry Types Traces Uniface generates trace data for each ProcScript module, showing the flow of ProcScript execution through your application. This helps identify bottlenecks and latency issues. Logs All putmess logs within your application can be exported as timestamped OpenTelemetry logs, useful for debugging and root cause analysis. Supported Platforms For details of the platforms that Uniface observability supports, see Platform Availability Matrix . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
